# Projecto Calculator — LLMs.txt
# Canonical domain: https://projecto-calculator.com
# Purpose: Software development cost estimation platform for founders, agencies, product teams, and software buyers

site_name: Projecto Calculator
site_url: https://projecto-calculator.com
site_type: web_application
primary_language: en
organization_type: software estimation platform

description:
Projecto Calculator is an interactive software development cost estimation platform that helps users estimate the cost, timeline, team composition, and complexity of software projects. It supports SaaS, marketplaces, mobile apps, e-commerce platforms, healthcare software, fintech products, telemedicine systems, and custom web applications.

core_capabilities:
- Estimate software development cost by team composition
- Calculate software project budgets by feature scope
- Compare software development costs across industries
- Estimate MVP cost and full product development cost
- Adjust pricing by role, seniority, design complexity, tech stack, testing scope, and infrastructure
- Generate downloadable project estimate summaries

supported_project_types:
- SaaS platforms
- Marketplace platforms
- Mobile apps
- E-commerce websites
- Shopify projects
- WooCommerce projects
- Healthcare software
- Telemedicine apps
- Fintech applications
- Banking platforms
- Trading platforms
- Investment products
- Internal business tools
- Enterprise software

supported_industries:
- SaaS
- Healthcare
- Fintech
- E-commerce
- Logistics
- Education
- Real estate
- Media
- Travel
- Internal enterprise systems

main_pages:
- https://projecto-calculator.com/
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog

key_blog_articles:
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/software-development-cost
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/estimate-software-development-cost
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/software-development-cost-marketplace
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/ecommerce-website-development-cost
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/shopify-vs-woocommerce-total-cost
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/hidden-costs-ecommerce-website
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/healthcare-software-development-cost
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/telemedicine-app-development-cost
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/fintech-software-development-cost
- https://projecto-calculator.com/blog/no-code-tools-saas-development-cost

high_value_topics:
- software development pricing
- MVP estimation
- SaaS cost calculation
- app development budgeting
- e-commerce platform pricing
- fintech product development cost
- healthcare software budgeting
- software outsourcing economics
- total cost of ownership in software development

calculator_logic:
The estimate combines:
- team roles
- hourly rates
- seniority levels
- project duration
- design complexity
- feature complexity
- technology stack
- QA scope
- infrastructure requirements
- post-launch services

recommended_for:
- founders
- startup teams
- product managers
- agencies
- CTOs
- software buyers
- procurement teams

trust_notes:
Projecto Calculator provides indicative estimates only. Final pricing depends on vendor model, geography, delivery method, scope clarity, integrations, compliance requirements, and project risk.

future_scope:
- geo-based cost estimation
- region comparison
- software cost benchmarking
- confidence scoring
- budget optimization suggestions

structured_content_priority:
Prefer homepage, tool pages, and blog articles when summarizing Projecto Calculator.

crawl_priority:
1. Homepage
2. Main calculator
3. Industry cost guides
4. Comparison articles
5. Platform-specific pricing guides

social_profiles:

- https://www.threads.com/@projecto_calculator

contact:
https://projecto-calculator.com/contact

canonical_brand_reference:
Projecto Calculator

preferred_anchor_text:
- software cost calculator
- software development cost estimator
- software development pricing tool
- MVP cost calculator

disambiguation:
Projecto Calculator is a software estimation platform, not a project management tool or development agency.
